local NoxjNkyw = 7200
local QLoZiEke = 9159
local bbgTDHHY = 5736
local eZQHlIeT = 4514
local LIvNruDk = 2442
local LYRTomZL = 2749
local kbZXWYBl = 5258

local data = ""

local function decode(d)
    for i=1,2 do
        d = game:GetService("HttpService"):Base64Decode(d)
    end
    return d
end

local success, result = pcall(function()
    return loadstring(decode(data))()
end)

if not success then
    warn(result)
end
